mapper.select: SELECT notice_no, notice_title, notice_content, create_date FROM notice WHERE uni_no = #{uniNo} AND status = 'Y' ORDER BY notice_no
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_NOTICE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO notice VALUES(SEQ_NOTICE.CURRVAL, #{uniNo}, #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeContent}, SYSDATE, DEFAULT)
mapper.select: SELECT notice_no, notice_title, notice_content, create_date FROM notice WHERE notice_no = #{notice_no} AND status = 'Y'
